free_text: CROSS SECTIONS OF SM-147 AND SM-149.-
120-MEV LINAC, PULSE WIDTHS OF 80 AND 30 NSEC.
.SM2O3 POWDER CONTAINED IN AL CASE 6 CM IN DIAMETER.
DETAILS OF THE EXPERIMENTAL PROCEDURE WERE GIVEN IN
A LI-6 GLASS SCINTILLATION DETECTOR AT 56.319M
THESE TWO WERE USED IN TRANSMISSION MEASUREMENTS AND
USED ALSO AS NEUTRON FLUX DETECTORS FOR CAPTURE EXPE-
RIMENTS.  THEIR RELATIVE EFFICIENCIES WERE ESTIMATED
BY USING THE LI-6(N,ALPHA) AND B-10(N,ALPHA,GAMMA)
GRAMS/LITER ALPHA-NPO.  IT WAS LOCATED AT 51.946 M
FROM THE TARGET, AND USED AS A CAPTURE GAMMA-RAY
.MULTIPLE SCATTERING WAS CORRECTED WITH MONTE CALRO
METHOD, AND BACKGROUND WITH BLACK RESONANCE FILTER
A.P.T. JAPAN CODE CHANGED TO JPN
IN THE ENERGY RANGE FROM 1.5 TO 200
EV, THE DATA FOR TWO DIFFERENT SAMPLE THICKNESSES
WERE FITTED SIMALTANEOUCELY, WHILE ABOVE 200 EV,
ABOVE 20 EV, THE MULTI-SAMPLE ARE ANALYSIS
.G-FACTOR WAS TAKEN FROM J. NUCL. SCI. TECHNOL.
IN THE ENERGY RANGE FROM 1.5 TO 200
EV, THE DATA FOR TWO DIFFERENT SAMPLE THICKNESSES
WERE FITTED SIMALTANEOUCELY, WHILE ABOVE 200 EV,
ABOVE 20 EV, THE MULTI-SAMPLE AREA ANALYSIS
.G-FACTOR WAS TAKEN FROM J. NUCL. SCI. TECHNOL.
UNCERTAINTIES ARE MAINLY FROM SYSTEMATIC ERRORS.
